builtin.name: Catown Built-in Importer
builtin.description: Imports GitHub repo/tree URLs, zip archives, raw SKILL.md files, and local package paths.

skills-cli.name: Vercel Skills CLI
skills-cli.description: Uses the public skills CLI ecosystem when available.

github-skill.name: GitHub Skill CLI
github-skill.description: Uses GitHub CLI skill commands when installed and authenticated.

skillhub-cn.name: SkillHub.cn
skillhub-cn.description: Uses the SkillHub.cn CLI. Install with: curl -fsSL https://skillhub-1388575217.cos.ap-guangzhou.myqcloud.com/install/install.sh | bash -s -- --cli-only
